## Problem

Describe the concrete problem this pull request solves.

## Change

Describe the implementation and public behavior.

## Authority and security impact

List any new or changed network, filesystem, process, credential, policy, approval, evidence, persistence, or release authority. Write `None` when there is no authority change.

## Verification

- [ ] Added or updated focused tests
- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `npm run test:consumer-types`
- [ ] `npm audit --omit=dev`
- [ ] `npm pack --dry-run`
- [ ] Updated public documentation and declarations when required
- [ ] Checked that no credential, private fixture, package archive, or dependency directory is included
- [ ] Marked provider examples as tested, fixture-tested, or illustrative
- [ ] Avoided certification, security-score, and unsupported benchmark claims

## Compatibility

Describe breaking changes, migration requirements, or write `No public compatibility change`.
